name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-copilot-apps-people-directory
title: People Directory - Find Microsoft 365 People in Copilot Chat
shortDescription: An SPFx Copilot Component that searches Microsoft 365 users in Copilot chat, with inline and fullscreen results, filters, and direct Teams/email actions.
longDescription: People Directory is a SharePoint Framework Copilot Component that brings Microsoft 365 people search directly into the Copilot canvas. A declarative agent calls the component as a tool and it renders a live, interactive people search experience in both inline and fullscreen display modes.

The sample reads real tenant directory data through the SPFx-brokered Microsoft Graph client using /users (beta), supports internal-only and active-only filters, shows profile photos and key identity details, and provides direct actions to start a Teams chat or send email to selected users.
